changes: Fix pre-commit hook to skip version bump on changelog-only commits, ending the retroactive-fix infinite regression
Add missing changelog entry for v0.0.3
Add About section to homepage; move Changelog, Roles & Permissions, and Data Files cards there
Add versioning system with auto-incrementing patch version on each commit
Add changelog page at /changelog with full version history
Add function index to teams/team.js for faster navigation
Add common task lookup table and architecture callouts to CLAUDE.md
